The median factor is 1.968.

Converting 13.33:
13.33 * 1.968:
13.33 * 0.008 = 0.10664
13.33 * 0.060 = 0.79980
13.33 * 0.900 = 11.99700
13.33 * 1.000 = 13.33000
0.10664 + 0.79980 = 0.90644
0.90644 + 11.99700 = 12.90344
12.90344 + 13.33000 = 26.23344
= 26.233

I will now return the answer in \boxed{}
The answer in \boxed{–} is \boxed{26.233}
